layman_headline: Ethereum looks beaten down enough to bounce — buying into extreme fear.
layman_explanation: The entire crypto market is gripped by extreme fear (25/100), which historically has been a good time to buy. Ethereum has dropped over 60% from its all-time high and its RSI reading of 35 shows it's approaching oversold territory. Today's strong +6.6% daily bounce with a bullish candlestick pattern suggests buyers are stepping in. Bitcoin is also pushing toward $65K on cooling inflation data, which could lift the whole market.
layman_action: Consider a small position in Ethereum around $1,850, with a firm stop-loss at $1,700. This is a contrarian bet that fear is overdone — only risk what you can afford to lose if the market drops further.
expert_reasoning: ETH RSI at 35 is our highest-confidence signal (80% win rate historically). The Bullish Marubozu candle on a downtrend is a textbook reversal signal. Price is below all MAs indicating we're catching a knife, but the extreme fear environment (25) with an improving trend (up from 22 yesterday) suggests sentiment is bottoming. The $41B Ethereum TVL remains stable, confirming fundamental demand hasn't evaporated. Risk/reward to chart levels is poor at 0.36x near-term, but the broader move from $1,773 support to $2,100 resistance gives us a 3:1 R/R on a swing basis with a $1,700 stop. High BTC dominance at 56.4% is a headwind for alts, which caps confidence below 70.
risk_factors: BTC dominance at 56.4% means capital is flowing to Bitcoin over alts — ETH could underperform even if BTC rallies
Price is below all major moving averages — this is a counter-trend trade that could fail if selling resumes
US inflation relief 'may already be fading' per CryptoSlate — macro could reverse and drag all risk assets down
watch_list: BTC ability to hold above $64,000 — if it breaks down, ETH will follow harder
Fear & Greed index trajectory — needs to continue improving above 25 to confirm sentiment bottoming
ETH price action around the $1,800 resistance level — a clean break and hold confirms the bounce is real
market_context: The crypto market is in extreme fear (25/100) but improving from 22 yesterday. BTC is bouncing toward $65K on cooling US inflation, creating a potential relief rally window, though high BTC dominance at 56.4% remains a headwind for altcoins.
context_banner: Extreme fear with an improving trend and oversold ETH creates a classic contrarian swing entry — disciplined stops are essential.

key_signals.description: ETH RSI at 35 is approaching oversold territory — our most reliable signal with an 80% historical win rate and +5.5% avg return.
Market at Extreme Fear (25) improving from 22 yesterday — contrarian buying in this zone has a 71% win rate in our track record.
Bitcoin pushing toward $65K on US inflation relief provides a macro tailwind for the entire market including ETH.
ETH derivatives have reset per Blockworks, reducing overleveraged positioning and clearing the way for a cleaner rally.
US/UK treasury alignment on tokenization and stablecoin rules is structurally positive for Ethereum as the dominant smart contract platform.
